title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.780 - Board authority to determine projects, assessments, credits and refunds, credit and assessment time limit
text:
100.780.  Board authority to determine projects, assessments, credits and refunds, credit and assessment time limit. — The board shall determine the amount and duration of a project and its associated assessments, credits and refunds.  The credit amount may not exceed the estimated assessment.  Assessments made for any project may not exceed a period of fifteen years.
(L. 1996 H.B. 1237 § 15)
